disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No airway/systemic anaphylaxis features — no breathing difficulty, no lip/tongue/throat swelling, no generalised hives, no dizziness
trigger_question_examples: Any trouble breathing, swelling of lips/tongue/throat, whole-body hives or feeling faint?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — breathing's fine, no lip/tongue swelling, no whole-body rash and I don't feel faint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid (hours) itch-predominant reaction with a central punctum; no red streaking up the leg, no fever — argues against cellulitis/lymphangitis
trigger_question_examples: Is it mainly itchy (rather than increasingly painful), and is there a red line spreading up your leg?
Any fever, or is the redness spreading fast and getting more painful over days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's mainly itchy, no red line up the leg, no fever, and it came up in hours.
